Welcome to Orange 🍊

A .NET 10 Clean Architecture service template with a modern front-end client.

🏗️

Clean Architecture

Organized into Domain, Application, Infrastructure, and API layers for clear separation of concerns.

⚡

Minimal API

Built on .NET 10 Minimal API for high performance and low overhead HTTP endpoints.

🔄

CQRS Pattern

Commands and queries separated for scalable business logic with a custom mediator pattern.

API Connection

Connected to: http://localhost:5000

🍊 Orange Clean Architecture Template
